Name: Daily_Probability
Description: The daily probability that an individual will move to the **Target_Property_Value**.

Name: Disqualifying_Properties
Description: A list of **IndividualProperty** key:value pairs that cause an intervention to be aborted (persistent interventions will stop being distributed to nodes with these values). See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information. Generally used to control the flow of health care access. For example, to prevent the same individual from accessing health care via two different routes at the same time.

Name: Dont_Allow_Duplicates
Description: If an individual's container has an intervention, set to true (1) to prevent them from receiving another copy of the intervention. Supported by all intervention classes.

Name: Intervention_Name
Description: The optional name used to refer to this intervention as a means to differentiate it from others that use the same class.

Name: Maximum_Duration
Description: The maximum amount of time individuals have to move to a new group. This timing works in conjunction with **Daily_Probability**.

Name: New_Property_Value
Description: An optional **IndividualProperty** key:value pair that will be assigned when the intervention is applied. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information. Generally used to indicate the broad category of health care cascade to which an intervention belongs to prevent individuals from accessing care through multiple pathways. For example, if an individual must already be taking a particular medication to be prescribed a new one.

Name: Revert
Description: The number of days before an individual moves back to their original group.

Name: Target_Property_Key
Description: The name of the individual property type whose value will be updated by the intervention.

Name: Target_Property_Value
Description: The user-defined value of the individual property that will be assigned to the individual.
